response.justification: Bogdan brings 17+ years of broad software engineering experience and a genuine entrepreneurial streak, but falls well short of the Principal/Director-level AI Strategy profile this role demands. His AI exposure is limited to roughly two months of MCP tooling and agentic workflow contributions at his current employer, with no prior history in AI/ML research, AI-powered product development at scale, or cloud architecture leadership. The role requires recognized AI expertise, strategic customer advisory capability, and a demonstrated track record of building and shipping AI platforms — none of which are evident in his resume. His background skews toward full-stack product engineering and open-source geo tooling rather than the innovation leadership and AI depth this position requires.
strengths: 17+ years of diverse engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure — satisfies the minimum tenure requirement
Genuine entrepreneurial experience as founder of GISCollective alongside full-time roles, plus community contributions via workshops and conference talks
Polyglot technical breadth (TypeScript, DLang, C++, Node.js, Swift) with recent hands-on AI-agent and MCP framework contributions
concerns: AI expertise is extremely thin and very recent — limited to ~2 months of MCP/agentic tooling with no prior AI/ML work, published research, or AI products at scale
No evidence of Director-level scope: no team leadership, no strategic customer advisory experience, and no organizational influence beyond individual contributor work
No advanced AI-related degree and no deep cloud architecture credentials at the scale expected for a cloud-and-AI strategy principal role
